Landing.heading: Production-ready Next.js starter
Landing.tagline: App Router · Tailwind v4 · shadcn/ui · TypeScript 6 · Node 24
Landing.cardDescription: Shared components, slate theme tokens, and the cn() helper.

Metadata.description: Production-ready Next.js starter for complex web applications.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Welcome back. Enter your credentials to continue.
login.error: Could not sign in. Check your credentials and try again.

passkey.error: Could not sign in with a passkey. Please try again.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.descriptionTotp: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to finish signing in.
twoFactor.descriptionBackup: Enter one of your saved backup codes to finish signing in.
twoFactor.errorTotp: That code didn’t match. Enter the current code from your app.
twoFactor.errorBackup: That backup code didn’t match. Try a different one.

signup.title: Create account
signup.description: Start with email and a password. It takes a moment.
signup.name: Name
signup.sentDescription: We sent a verification link to {email}. Confirm your email to finish signing up.
signup.sentHint: Didn’t get it? Check your spam folder, or resend the link.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we’ll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sentDescription: If an account exists for that email, we’ve sent a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.sentHint: The link expires shortly. Without email configured, the reset URL is logged to the server in development.

magicLink.title: Sign in with email
magicLink.description: Enter your email and we’ll send you a one-time sign-in link.
magicLink.error: Could not send the sign-in link. Please try again.
magicLink.sentDescription: We’ve sent a one-time sign-in link to your email.
magicLink.sentHint: The link works once and expires in 5 minutes.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.error: Could not reset your password. The link may have expired.
resetPassword.invalidDescription: This password reset link is missing or has expired.
resetPassword.invalidHint: Reset links are single-use and time-limited. Request a fresh one to continue.
resetPassword.doneDescription: Your password has been changed. You can sign in with it now.
resetPassword.doneHint: The old password no longer works.

social.error: Could not start sign-in. Please try again.

goodbye.title: Your account has been deleted
goodbye.description: Your profile and all of its data are gone, and you’ve been signed out everywhere. Thanks for giving this a try — you’re welcome back any time.

home.title: Dashboard
home.cardDescription: Gated by the proxy (optimistic, edge) and the layout’s authoritative session check.
home.cardBody: Replace this shell with your app. Use the account menu (top right) to sign out.

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.description: Live updates pushed over Server-Sent Events. Send yourself a test notification, then open this page in a second tab to watch it arrive in real time across connections.
Notifications.sendError: Could not send the notification. Please try again.
Notifications.empty: No notifications yet. Send yourself a test one above.
Notifications.unread: {count, plural, =0 {No unread} one {# unread} other {# unread}}

page.title: Account
page.subtitle: Manage your profile and security settings.
page.profileDescription: Your display name and the email you sign in with.
page.verifiedHint: We'll first send a confirmation link to your current address; the change takes effect after you open it and then verify the new address.
page.unverifiedHint: Your email isn't verified yet, so the change takes effect immediately.
page.passwordDescription: Change the password you use to sign in.
page.passwordDescriptionSocial: You signed in with a social provider, so there is no password to change.
page.passwordResetPointer: To set a password for email sign-in, use the <link>password reset</link> flow.

avatar.hint: JPG, PNG or GIF, up to 2MB.

email.label: New email
email.error: Could not change your email. Please try again.
email.confirmationSent: We sent a confirmation link to your current email address. Open it to continue — then we'll email {email} a final verification link to finish the change.

password.error: Could not change your password. Check your current password.
password.updated: Password updated — other sessions have been signed out.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.description: Add a one-time code from an authenticator app to your sign-in for an extra layer of security.
twoFactor.descriptionSocial: Two-factor authentication protects password sign-in, so it isn't available on a social-only account.
twoFactor.socialPointer: To use two-factor authentication, first set a password for email sign-in via the <link>password reset</link> flow.
twoFactor.scanHint: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code it shows to finish.
twoFactor.manualKey: Can’t scan? Enter this key manually:
twoFactor.errorStart: Could not start setup. Check your password and try again.
twoFactor.errorVerify: That code didn't match. Try the current code from your app.
twoFactor.errorDisable: Could not disable. Check your password and try again.
twoFactor.errorRegenerate: Could not regenerate. Check your password and try again.
twoFactor.enabledDescription: You’ll be asked for a code from your authenticator app when you sign in.
twoFactor.startDescription: Confirm your password to begin setup.
twoFactor.regenerateDescription: This replaces your existing backup codes — the old ones stop working immediately.
twoFactor.disableDescription: You'll no longer be asked for a code when you sign in.
twoFactor.backupHint: Save these somewhere safe. Each works once if you lose access to your authenticator. They’re shown only now.

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.description: Sign in without a password using your device’s biometrics or a security key. Passkeys work alongside your existing sign-in methods.
passkeys.empty: You haven’t added any passkeys yet.
passkeys.errorAdd: Could not add a passkey. Please try again.
passkeys.errorRename: Could not rename the passkey. Please try again.
passkeys.errorRemove: Could not remove the passkey. Please try again.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.description: Devices currently signed in to your account. Revoking one signs that device out; pages it already has open may take a few minutes to notice.

privacy.title: Privacy & data
privacy.description: Control how your usage is tracked and export your data.
privacy.enabled: Enabled — anonymous product-usage events help us improve the app.
privacy.disabled: Disabled — no analytics events are collected.
privacy.dataDescription: Download a copy of the data associated with your account — profile, sessions, posts, uploads, subscriptions, and more — as a JSON file.
privacy.downloaded: Your data export has been downloaded.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.description: Permanently delete your account and all of its data — profile, posts, uploads, sessions, and subscription records.
delete.emailNote: We'll email you a confirmation link; nothing is deleted until you open it.
delete.immediateNote: This takes effect immediately and cannot be undone.
delete.emailSent: We sent a confirmation link to your email address. Your account will be deleted when you open it in a browser where you're signed in — the link works once and expires in 24 hours.
delete.errorFreshness: For security, deleting your account needs a recent sign-in. Sign out, sign back in, and try again.
delete.errorGeneric: Could not delete your account. Please try again.

page.title: Admin area
page.description: Signed in as {email} (role: {role}). Promote or demote any user below — you can't change your own role.

ban.bannedToast: User banned. Their sessions were revoked.

page.title: Organization
page.subtitle: Manage the active organization’s members and invitations.

manager.emptyDescription: You're in your Personal workspace. Create an organization, or switch to one from the workspace menu in the header, to manage its members and invitations.

members.title: Members
members.description: People with access to this organization.
members.errorRole: Could not update the member's role.

invite.title: Invite a member
invite.description: They’ll join once they accept the invitation.
invite.offlineNote: Email is off, so copy the invite link from the list below to share it.
invite.created: Invitation created for {email}. Copy its link from the list below to share it.

invitations.title: Pending invitations
invitations.description: People invited who haven’t joined yet.

settings.nameDescription: The display name your members see.
settings.dangerOwner: Deleting the organization removes it and all its memberships. This can't be undone.
settings.dangerMember: Leaving removes your access to this organization. An owner or admin would have to re-invite you.

create.title: Create organization
create.description: A workspace you can invite teammates to. You’ll be its owner.
create.slugDescription: The unique identifier for this organization.
create.error: Could not create the organization. The slug may be taken.

acceptPage.invalidDescription: This invitation link is invalid. Ask an organization admin to send a new one.
acceptPage.usedDescription: This invitation is no longer pending ({status}). Ask an admin to send a new one if you still need access.
acceptPage.expiredDescription: This invitation has expired. Ask an organization admin to send a new one.
acceptPage.joinDescription: You've been invited to join {org} as {role}.

accept.signInPrompt: Sign in as {email} to accept this invitation.
accept.mismatch: This invitation is for {invited}, but you’re signed in as {signedIn}. Switch accounts to accept it.
accept.error: Could not accept the invitation. It may have expired.

page.title: Posts
page.description: Read via the public tRPC query, newest first.

composer.title: New post
composer.signedIn: Signed in as {email} — publishing indexes the post for search.

list.empty: No posts yet. Publish one above, or run pnpm --filter @repo/db db:seed.

stats.count: {total, plural, one {# post} other {# posts}} published.

page.title: Upload demo
page.description: Upload an image (max 4MB) via Uploadthing. Requires sign-in.
page.listDescription: Files you've uploaded. Deleting removes the file from storage and the record here.

list.empty: No uploads yet — files you upload above will show up here.

page.title: Search demo
page.description: Full-text search over the posts index via Meilisearch. Create posts on /posts to index them on write; admins can bulk-reindex from the database.

demo.emptyHint: Type a query and hit Search. Create posts on /posts first if you get no results.
demo.emptyHintAdmin: Type a query and hit Search. Create posts on /posts first if you get no results (or reindex from the database above).
demo.noResults: No results for “{query}”. Did you reindex from the database?

page.title: Billing demo
page.description: Start a hosted Stripe Checkout session for an example $10/mo plan.

success.title: Subscription started
success.body: Subscription access is confirmed server-side by the Stripe webhook.

signedOut.title: Premium content
signedOut.description: Sign in to see whether your plan unlocks this.

unlocked.title: Pro content unlocked
unlocked.description: You have an active subscription, so this premium section is available.
unlocked.body: Swap this for the real gated feature. The gate is a single call —hasActiveSubscription(userId)— so any Server Component, Server Action, or tRPC procedure can reuse it.

locked.title: This content is for subscribers
locked.description: Your account has no active subscription. Subscribe to unlock premium content.

StateDemo.title: Zustand store demo
StateDemo.description: Two components, one global useUiStore. Toggling either keeps both in sync — and the preference persists across reloads (the hydration-safe persist recipe, STATE.md).

page.title: Observability demo
page.description: Error tracking (Sentry), structured logging (BetterStack), and analytics + feature flags (PostHog). Each button is a no-op until its env vars are set.

demo.statusSentry: Captured a test exception → Sentry (no-op without a DSN).
demo.statusLog: Sent a structured log → BetterStack (console output without creds).
demo.statusPosthog: Captured an analytics event → PostHog (no-op without a key).

Error.title: Something went wrong
Error.description: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again, or head back home.
